chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.2520 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application ----------------------------------------------------- 11.02.2025 Mr. Ghulam Asghar, advocate for applicant Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh IO L/SI Saira Memon of PS Memon Goth Complainant present ------------------------------------ Learned counsel for applicant at the very outset does not press this criminal bail application on merits and seeks direction to the trial Court to decide the case of applicant/ accused, preferably within a period of two months. Learned Additional Prosecutor General Sindh has recorded her no objection. In view of above, instant criminal bail application is dismissed as not pressed. However, trial Court is directed to decide the case of applicant/accused, preferably within a period of two months. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
